item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👍💵Sienna Jarrard - Washington Student Association
item.description: Sienna Jarrard signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Student Association. They are a registered lobbyist.
